name: Bounce Ball
author: Poki
description: Bounce Ball is a merge game that blends the fun of classic Bubble Shooter with the clever strategy of 2048! Swipe, aim, and release your balls to smash through obstacles and merge matching numbers. Every shot counts as you solve colorful puzzles and climb through increasingly challenging levels. Ready to bounce, merge, and master the board? How to play Bounce Ball? Move your cursor or finger to aim, click or tap to shoot balls. Who created Bounce Ball? Bounce Ball is created by WeDoYouPlay. Play their other creative and entertaining games on Poki : Hospital Stories: Doctor Soccer , Hospital Stories: Doctor Rugby , Hospital Stories: Doctor Basketball , Nonogram , Words Emoji , Circus Contest , Word Chains , Goblock , and Sugar Eyes ! How can I play Bounce Ball for free? You can play Bounce Ball for free on Poki. Can I play Bounce Ball on mobile devices and desktop? Bounce Ball can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
